name: Spicy Orange Ginger & Lemon Chicken Breast
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces boned and skinned chicken breast halves (about 3.5 oz per serving)
2 small garlic cloves, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the rind pieces from the orange and lemon using a vegetable peeler and roughly chop them.
2. Heat a sauté or skillet large enough to hold the chicken pieces.
3. Spray or add olive oil to the pan, then sear the chicken pieces on both sides until lightly browned.
4. Meanwhile, combine all sauce ingredients in a measuring cup or bowl with spout.
5. Pour the sauce mixture into the hot pan and let it boil slightly to cook the thickener.
6. Reduce heat to low, cover tightly, and gently simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Serve the chicken with the cooking juices.
8. Add water (1/4 to 1/2 cup) or more apple juice to moisten the sauce if desired.
9. Serve with noodles, angel hair spaghetti, or hot steamed white rice (long or medium grain). A dark green vegetable medley is also a good choice.
Variation:
For darker meat, use chicken thighs with attached legs. Remove skin, sear, add sauce, and simmer until done for about 35 to 40 minutes total time.
